pulse_surveys.note: Feeling good about the onboarding process
Really enjoying the work so far

experience_ratings.note: Good overall, could use more hands-on tasks

comments.comment: The onboarding checklist was very helpful and guided me through everything smoothly.
I wish there was more hands-on training in the first week.
My mentor was extremely supportive and answered all my questions.
The documentation could be more detailed for the development setup.
Great company culture and very welcoming team members!
It would be helpful to have a buddy system in addition to the mentor program.
The HR welcome session provided all the information I needed about benefits.
Security training was comprehensive but a bit lengthy.
I appreciated the flexibility to work remotely from day one.
Overall a very positive onboarding experience. Thank you!
